{{Quote|You were too young to realize the ''sewer'' that the Old Republic had become. Grand Moff Lynch took control and ''changed'' all that. He is ''strong''...and we ''will'' help him keep the peace...in any way ''possible''!|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Trommer]]|<ref name="River of Chaos 1">[[River of Chaos 1|''River of Chaos'' 1]]</ref>}}
[[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] '''Lynch Hauser''' was a high-ranking official within the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
When [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] [[Declaration of a New Order|declared]] his [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Hauser was made [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] of the [[Dustig Oversector]] and assumed the role of commander of the [[Seventeenth Army|17th Sector Army]].<ref name="TEGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

Hauser later assigned [[TIE pilot]] [[Ranulf Trommer/Legends|Ranulf Trommer]] to spy on the corrupt [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Grigor (governor)|Grigor]]. Eventually, Trommer was able to send a report back with proof of Grigor's unsanctioned operations. After the news was brought to him, he and [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Trommer]], Ranulf's father, came to [[M'haeli/Legends|M'haeli]] to see first-hand the treachery of [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Grigor (governor)|Grigor]].

When Ranulf asked Hauser what he was planning to do with [[Mora]], the leader of the Rebel resistance on [[M'haeli/Legends|M'haeli]], the Moff told the man that he was planning to execute her. However, Ranulf was in love with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|rebel]] and could not accept this decision and thus, killed a stormtrooper under Hauser's command in order to rescue Mora. Hauser had an open shot at Ranulf yet was interrupted by the latter's father. Mora and Ranulf hence escaped and fled [[The galaxy/Legends|off-world]]. Due to Ranulf's defection, Hauser placed a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on the former.
